headline: Claude pushes into financial services as banks deploy it across their organizations.
body: Claude leads the window on the back of enterprise adoption, with large banks rolling it out and Anthropic convening a financial services briefing on real deployments. Anthropic's public dispute with the administration appears to coincide with favorable sales data, tying Claude's momentum to government oversight. On the technical side, a cluster of efficiency methods is breaking out together: prompt caching, transformer pruning, agent skills, training-free methods, and parameter sharing, alongside continued movement in quantization. NVIDIA expanded its enterprise footprint with an XR AI framework for AR glasses and a guide to transaction foundation models for financial intelligence.

cited_items.title: Anthropic's latest feud with the admin may help it, sales data suggests
Building AI Agents for AR Glasses and XR Devices with NVIDIA XR AI
Build Your Own Transaction Foundation Model for Financial Intelligence
Claude Fable 5 with Harness Engineering & Loops Will Do Everything.
